title: SpyBedWars
description: Advanced Bedwars plugin with easy to setup arenas
body:
# SpyBedWars
### (Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/fzcGYV7E9Q) for any issue/query/suggestion)

**SpyBedWars** is a high-performance BedWars minigame designed for modern networks. It’s built to be fast, stable, and easy to set up, using **SpyCore** for advanced world management.

# Commands are same as Bedwars1058
- bw create <arena>
- bw setup <arena>
- bw settype <arena> <SOLO|DOUBLES|TRIPLES|FOURS>
- bw setmin <arena> <value>
- bw setmax <arena> <value>
- bw addgenerator <arena> <IRON|GOLD|DIAMOND|EMERALD>
- bw enable <arena>
- bw disable <arena>
- bw gui
- bw gui <SOLO|DOUBLES|TRIPLES|FOURS>
And more...

### ⚔️ Game Mechanics
- **Arena Modes**: Supports Solo and Team games with a dynamic lobby system.
- **Resource Generators**: Phase-based spawning for Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Emerald. Spawner speeds increase as the game progresses.
- **Team Upgrades**: Classic upgrades like Sharpness, Protection, and Haste.
- **Heal Pools**: Base upgrades that provide a regeneration radius (30 blocks) for your team.
- **Persistent Stats**: Locked hunger and disabled natural regen to keep the focus on strategy and Golden Apples.

### 🛠️ Key Features
- **NPC Integration**: Works natively with **SpyNPCs** for Shop and Upgrade villagers.
- **Safe State Handling**: Automatically saves and restores shop locations even if the world unloads unexpectedly.
- **Optimized Performance**: Lightweight tasks handle all resource spawning and scoreboard updates without server lag.
- **Spectator Mode**: Seamless transition to spectator mode upon final death.

### 🛡️ Requirements & Compatibility
- **Dependencies**: Requires [SpyCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/spycore) and [SpyNPCs](https://modrinth.com/plugin/spynpcs).
- **Loaders**: PaperMC (Recommended) & Spigot.
- **Version**: Minecraft 1.21.11.

---
*Developed by SpyGamingOG*
